GB 17896一2022
Table 1一Energy efficiency grades of electronic ballasts for tubular fluorescent lamps (continued)
Efficiency
Lamp Data
%
Nominal                                      Rated
Lamp types and diagrams       power               ILCOS               power | Grade 1| Grade 2 | Grade 3
W                                           W
TCTE                                            FSM6H-120-L/P-2G8=1
120                                         122      92.6               84.7
FSM8H-120-LV/P-2G8=1
NOTE 1 Lamp rated power is that specified in relevant lamp data sheet of corresponding performance standard.
NOTE 2 ”The efficiency of multi-lamp type ballasts of each grade is the same value specified in the table. The lamp
power is calculated using the sum of the power of all lamps connected to the ballast.
NOTE 3 The efficiency of dimmable electronic ballasts of each grade is measured at 100% Iumen output of the oper-
ated lamp(s).
